Container.Name: hoymetrics
Container.Overview: Polls a Hoymiles solar inverter DTU over the local network and exposes data as Prometheus metrics and/or logs it to CSV. Supports single fetch, periodic, and daemon (Prometheus exporter) modes.

Config.Name: DTU IP
Config.Description: IP address of the Hoymiles DTU on your local network. Required.

Config.Name: Fetch Mode
Config.Description: daemon = long-running Prometheus exporter. Leave empty for single fetch.

Config.Name: Fetch Interval
Config.Description: Seconds between polls. Minimum 10. Values below 35 enable performance data mode on the DTU.

Config.Name: Prometheus Port
Config.Description: Port the container listens on for /metrics (daemon mode only). Must match the Metrics Port mapping below.

Config.Name: Log File
Config.Description: Full path inside the container to write CSV logs. Leave empty to disable CSV logging. Example: /data/hoymiles_log.csv

Config.Name: Metrics Port
Config.Description: Host port for the Prometheus /metrics endpoint. Must match the Prometheus Port variable above.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Host path for CSV log storage. Only needed when LOG_FILE is set.
